section.heading: Limitation on assistance

content.p: In carrying out this subchapter, the Secretary shall provide technical assistance and financial assistance with respect to not more than 450 active designated areas.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 97–98, title XV, § 1535, as added Pub. L. 107–171, title II, § 2504, May 13, 2002, 116 Stat. 274.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 3458, Pub. L. 97–98, title XV, § 1535, Dec. 22, 1981, 95 Stat. 1340, related to program evaluation, prior to the general amendment of this subchapter by Pub. L. 107–171.
